bugs.description: Image missing alt attribute
Empty button with no text or aria-label
Insufficient color contrast — #999 text on #fff background
Form input with no associated label element
Missing <title> element in document head
Missing meta viewport tag for responsive design
Anchor link with empty href attribute
Heading hierarchy skip — h1 to h3 with no h2
Horizontal overflow — 2000px element inside 375px container
Touch target too small — 20x20px button (minimum is 44x44px)
Image missing alt attribute
Empty button with no text or aria-label
Insufficient color contrast — #aaa text on #fff background
Form inputs with no associated label elements
Missing <title> element in document head
Missing meta viewport tag for responsive design
Anchor link with empty href attribute
Heading hierarchy skip — h1 to h3 with no h2
Horizontal overflow — 2000px element inside constrained container
Touch target too small — 20x20px button (minimum is 44x44px)
Text overflows container at mobile widths — unbreakable long string without word-wrap
Z-index conflict — two positioned elements with same z-index overlapping
Inconsistent spacing — 13px padding instead of 16px used elsewhere
Missing Open Graph meta tags (og:title, og:description, og:image)
Font inconsistency — Arial on stat values vs Helvetica on stat labels
Image missing alt attribute in table row
Stat card widths subtly unequal — 380px vs 412px vs 395px
Table action buttons stacked vertically instead of horizontal row
Email text truncated with ellipsis in sidebar when it should be visible
Missing <title> element in document head
CSS Grid gap of 13px instead of 16px (spacing inconsistency)
Delete button has same color as Edit button — should be red for destructive action
Missing canonical URL link element
Font loading fallback visible — references nonexistent Google Font causing FOUT
Fixed-position banner covers page content when scrolled to bottom
Table headers have no sort indicators despite being a data table
Inconsistent date formats in same table — Mar 5 vs March 5th vs 2026-03-05
No Content Security Policy meta tag
Print stylesheet hides all content — nothing visible when printed
Animation uses left property instead of transform causing layout thrashing
Nested interactive elements — button inside an anchor link
Auto-playing CSS animation that cannot be paused (notification pulse)
Text selection disabled (user-select: none) on table content that should be selectable
Scrollbar appears/disappears in table causing layout shift
Tab order (tabindex) does not match visual order of quick action buttons
Visual hierarchy inversion — secondary 'Learn More' button is larger (17px/700) than primary 'Get Started' CTA (15px/500)
Misaligned baseline — hero badge icon (20px) offset 3px from text baseline via incorrect vertical-align and margin-top
Inconsistent border-radius — hero card 12px, feature cards 8px, testimonial cards 10px (three different values)
Hover state inconsistency — nav links change color, CTA changes opacity, footer links add underline (three different patterns)
Phantom scrollbar — metrics section has overflow:auto with content barely exceeding container height (210px in 200px)
Whitespace grouping error — 24px gap between feature title and its description is larger than gap between adjacent cards, breaking visual grouping
Truncation ambiguity — testimonial text ends with literal '...' that looks like CSS text-overflow truncation but is actual content
Ghost click area — entire resource card including 40px padding is wrapped in an <a> tag with no visual affordance for the clickable region
Responsive gap — 3-column features grid doesn't reflow between 480px and 768px breakpoints, causing column overlap around 520px
Off-brand color — Enterprise pricing button uses #6D28D9 (violet) instead of brand primary #6366F1 (indigo)
Focus ring missing — hamburger menu button has outline:none with no visible focus replacement
Line-height inconsistency — second testimonial text uses line-height:1.4 while all other body text uses 1.6
Dark mode partial implementation — testimonials section keeps white background (#FFFFFF) when prefers-color-scheme:dark is active
Letter-spacing mismatch — testimonials heading uses letter-spacing:0 while all other section headings use -0.02em
Orphaned word — hero heading wraps to leave 'Platform' alone on the last line, creating a typographic widow
Image aspect ratio distortion — team photo containers use aspect-ratio 1/1.1 instead of 1/1, cutting off top of headshots
Invisible text on gradient — CTA section gradient fades from dark (#1E1B4B) to light blue (#93C5FD) with white text that becomes unreadable at the bottom
Tab order mismatch — DOM order is nav-links then logo then CTA, but visual order via flexbox is logo then nav-links then CTA
Placeholder text styling — input placeholder color and weight match typed text, making it impossible to distinguish empty from filled state
Sticky header shadow missing — header becomes sticky on scroll but has no box-shadow, blending into content below
Double scrollbar — footer wrapped in overflow:auto container creates nested scrollbar alongside page scrollbar
Touch target overlap — metrics period buttons (Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Yearly) have only 4px gap, causing tap area overlap on mobile
Content shift on load — Google Font (Inter) loads via display=swap causing visible layout shift as fallback font is replaced
Inconsistent icon sizes — feature icons are 24px, 20px (.icon-small), and 28px (.icon-large) instead of uniform sizing
Missing print styles — no @media print rules to hide nav, footer, or decorative elements when printed
Dropdown doesn't close on outside click — no document click listener to dismiss the profile dropdown menu
Form validation timing — error messages always show on blur and hide on focus, reappearing on blur even when input is now valid
Button double-click — submit button is never disabled after first click, allowing duplicate form submissions
Modal focus trap missing — Tab key moves focus to elements behind the modal overlay instead of being trapped within the dialog
Scroll lock failure — opening the modal does not set overflow:hidden on body, allowing background content to scroll
Hover state stuck — hover cards use JS-applied 'hovered' class via mouseenter/touchstart without reliable touchend cleanup, causing styles to persist on touch devices
Auto-focus wrong element — search input has autofocus attribute, causing screen readers to skip the page title and hero content
Keyboard shortcut conflict — pressing '/' to focus search also types '/' into currently focused input fields due to missing focus check and preventDefault
Disabled button not actually disabled — 'Delete Project' button has CSS .disabled class but no HTML disabled attribute, so it remains clickable
Carousel not keyboard-navigable — prev/next controls have role=button and tabindex=0 but no keydown handler, so Enter/Space do nothing
Broken image — src points to nonexistent file /images/nonexistent-beach-photo.jpg (404)
Broken image — src uses invalid protocol htp:// instead of http://
Broken image — src is empty string, causing browser to request the page itself
Broken image missing alt attribute entirely — no accessible name for screen readers
Informational image has empty alt="" — should have descriptive alt text for the Lavender photo
Incorrect price — Summit GTX shows $299.90 instead of the correct price $29.99 (10x overcharge)
Icon-only wishlist buttons in 'Also Viewed' cards have no aria-label or accessible text
Nested interactive elements — wishlist buttons are inside anchor links in the 'Also Viewed' section
Size selector buttons have no aria-pressed state to indicate which size is currently selected
Phone input field has no associated <label> element — only a placeholder for accessible name
Submit button does not disable after click — allows duplicate form submissions
Email field missing required attribute — form can be submitted without an email address
Success message has role="status" but no aria-live attribute — screen readers won't announce it
Mobile menu doesn't close when clicking outside it — no click listener on the overlay backdrop
Hamburger button has outline:none with no visible focus replacement — invisible to keyboard users
Active nav link has poor contrast — #555 text on #1a1a2e background fails WCAG AA
Hamburger button has no aria-label or accessible text — screen readers see an empty button
